ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brand is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the product line belongs to */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product line (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the product line was launched */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product line is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line the size chart belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing */,
  "bust_in" TEXT /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist_in" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip_in" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "clothing_size" TEXT /* Clothing size range (e.g., 0-2, 4-6) */,
  "shoulder_in" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_in" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_in" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in inches (for bottoms) */,
  "length_in" TEXT /* Length measurement in inches (for dresses and outerwear) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the product price */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "is_seasonal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is seasonal */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the variant belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the variant */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the variant */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variant in stock */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit (SKU) of the variant */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the variant */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be placed */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the variant was last reordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the order (ISO 4217) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variant in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variant in the order */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the variant in the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "currency_preference" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "return_method" TEXT /* Method of return (e.g., In-store, Mail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variant in inventory */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the variant is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variant in inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock level is low */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date the stock was last checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current occupancy of the warehouse */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, warehouse staff, customer support) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Sales, Warehouse, Support) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region (ISO 4217) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
